From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Estonian steeplechase runner

Kaur Kivistik

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Kaur Kivistik at [2015 European Team Championships](/wiki/2015_European_Team_Championships "2015 European Team Championships") First League. | |
| Personal information | |
| Born | (1991-04-29) 29 April 1991 (age 34)[[1]](#cite_note-1)  [Tartu](/wiki/Tartu "Tartu"), [Estonia](/wiki/Estonia "Estonia") |
| Height | 192 cm (6 ft 4 in) |

**Kaur Kivistik** (born 29 April 1991) is an [Estonian](/wiki/Estonians "Estonians") athlete competing in the [3000 metres steeplechase](/wiki/3000_metres_steeplechase "3000 metres steeplechase").[[2]](#cite_note-2) He won the silver medal at the [2015 Summer Universiade](/wiki/2015_Summer_Universiade "2015 Summer Universiade").

His personal best in the event is 8:28.55 set in Zagreb in 2019.
